Jeepers Creepers (1939 animated film) Jeepers Creepers is a 1939 "Looney Tunes" animated short starring Porky Pig. It was directed by Robert Clampett. It was released on DVD on September 19, 2017, in the "Porky Pig 101". Porky is a police officer, who is in a police car that is named 6 7/8.
